title: The Rat
writer: Constance Collier, Graham Cutts, Ivor Novello
actors: Ivor Novello, Mae Marsh, Isabel Jeans
plot: When bored courtesan Zelie de Chaumet begs her lover, the corrupt and powerful Stetz, to take her slumming, the pair encounter Pierre Boucheron, alias 'The Rat' , boy-king of the Paris underworld, and the innocent Odile. Love, lif...
